title: 8 Pack Acrylic Heart Rhinestone Stickers, Self-Adhesive Gem Stickers, Face Jewels Stick On Gems, Heart Sticker for Kids DIY, Face Gems Rhinestones for Craft Valentine Wedding Decoration (8 Colors)
features: 1. Vibrant & Colorful: These gem stickers include 8 sheets of rhinestone stickers in dazzling colors like red, pink, and clear. Perfect for crafts, the face jewels feature heart stickers in multiple sizes. Ideal for face gems for kids and DIY jewelry making

2. Premium Acrylic Material: Made from high-quality acrylic, these stick on gems are durable, waterproof, and fade-resistant. The face jewels stick on smoothly with a glossy finish, ensuring long-lasting sparkle. Lightweight yet sturdy, they’re perfect for makeup, crafts, and decorations

3. Multi-Sized & Adhesive: The red heart stickers come in 8 colors for versatile use. Self-adhesive backs make application effortless—no glue needed! Easy to peel and reposition, these rhinestones for craft are beginner-friendly and leave no residue

4. Sparkling & Versatile: These face gems add glam to any project! Decorate phones, clothes, jewelry, or party accessories. Whether for weddings, festivals, or kids’ crafts, these heart rhinestone stickers bring dazzling charm to every creation

5. Perfect for Gifting & DIY: Great for crafters and kids alike, these stick on heart gems make chic gifts or party favors. Use them to embellish cards, bags, or DIY jewelry—endless possibilities with these vibrant rhinestone stickers
description: Product description 8 Pack Acrylic Heart Rhinestone Stickers – Sparkling Gem Stickers for Creative Fun! ﻿ Add a touch of glam with these dazzling rhinestone stickers! Perfect as face jewels, stick on gems, or rhinestones for craft, these heart stickers bring sparkle to any project. ﻿ The 8 Pack Acrylic Heart Rhinestone Stickers feature vibrant red heart stickers and other colors, making them ideal for DIY crafts, nail art, or as face gems for kids. ﻿ Easy to apply and reusable, these face jewels stick on smoothly to skin, phone cases, scrapbooks, and more. Let creativity shine with these high-quality, self-adhesive gem stickers! Safety Warning NO
